title: Loud Pack
description: A Minecraft ressource packs to make everythings LOUDER in the game.
body:
# ENGLISH VERSION

### You can use this pack with a oldest version of the game. Simply use it normally and don't worry about compatibility advertisements.

This resource pack modifies the game's sounds for a whole new experience. A LOUDER experience, one where you can enjoy every nuance, note and chord of all the iconic sounds and music of the game that is Minecraft. Thanks to this pack, you'll enjoy every broken block and the mumbling of the villagers will be honey for your ears. You'll rediscover the sonic power of explosions and wither bosses, and victory over the dragon will literally unplug your ears.

 

To sum up, this pack offers you :

- Bass Boosted Sound
- Loud Walking Sounds
- EVERYTHING IS LOUD

 
  



> PS: for headset users, take care. This experience is so overwhelming it could make you lose your hearing.\
PS: This pack is the humble sequel to the best resource pack LOUD TEXTURE PACK available here.
